tables.purpose: Renders interactive pandas dataframes for trace logs and ROI scenario comparisons. Supports native sorting.
tables.notes: Lowest effort for displaying multi-row tabular data like opportunity clusters.

tables.purpose: Static styled table for displaying final subsidy/cost breakdowns.
tables.notes: Hardcoded HTML structure in s2_report.py; better to use st.dataframe for dynamic Neuss lists.

cards.purpose: Displays key performance indicators (KPIs) in a responsive grid layout.
cards.notes: Highly reusable for top-level stats like 'Total Leads' or 'Avg Score'.

cards.purpose: Displays policy violations or redlines with custom CSS styling.
cards.notes: Can be repurposed to display top reasons for opportunity scoring.

filters.notes: Standard Streamlit inputs, ready for immediate reuse.

badges.purpose: Displays data quality/confidence levels (Level A, B, C).
badges.notes: Perfect for displaying the 'confidence' metric in the MVP.

badges.purpose: Large colored banners indicating case outcome (e.g. ELIGIBLE, BLOCKED).
badges.notes: CSS classes (report-verdict-ELIGIBLE) can be reused for recommended actions.

panels.notes: Ideal for the 'expandable detail card' requirement for cluster specifics.

panels.purpose: Native callout blocks for context and alerts.
panels.notes: Good for contextual instructions or disclaimers.
